nasb.text: Nevertheless Saul did not speak anything that day, for he thought, “It is an accident, he is not clean, surely he is not clean.”

esv.text: Yet Saul did not say anything that day, for he thought, “Something has happened to him. He is not clean; surely he is not clean.”

cnv.text: 那天掃羅沒有說甚麼，因為他心裡想：“這是恰巧的事，或許大衛沾染了不潔，還沒有得到潔淨。”

ccb.text: 那一天，扫罗并没有说什么，他以为大卫可能遇到了使自己不洁净的事，不能赴宴。
